testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup
testcase.failure: java.lang.NullPointerException at java.base/java.util.Objects.requireNonNull(Objects.java:233) at java.base/java.util.ImmutableCollections$Map1.<init>(ImmutableCollections.java:1112) at java.base/java.util.Map.of(Map.java:1365) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.DriverCommand.GET(DriverCommand.java:251) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.get(RemoteWebDriver.java:374) at testbase.Baseclass.setup(Baseclass.java:45) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) ... testcase.name: verify_account_registration
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Your Account Has Been Created] but found [invalid session id: session deleted as the browser has closed the connection from disconnected: unable to send message to renderer (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.138) Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.6' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [656f6aa95b6c44a59c225d309f5ee341, findElement {value=yourxpath, using=xpath}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.138, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Madhu\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:52328}, goog:processID: 4180, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:52328/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.138, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 656f6aa95b6c44a59c225d309f5ee341] at testCases.TC001AccountRegistration.verify_account_registration(TC001AccountRegistration.java:51) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) ...
